KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_MANUAL_ASSEMBLY.desc: Fuse the two leftmost eligible Components: upgrade the body and exhaust the material. A normal body can only be fused once each combat.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FEED_PUMP.title: Feed Pump
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_FEED_PUMP.descriptio: Store 1 Mechanical Material. [gold]Loop P[/gold]. When upgraded, also gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_REACTION_MOLD.title: Reaction Mold
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_REACTION_MOLD.descri: Store 1 Compound Material. [gold]Loop P[/gold]. When upgraded, store 2 instead.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RECIPROCATING_CUTTER: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 1 Scrap to your hand. [gold]Loop C[/gold]. Durable Component.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RETURN_PLATE.title: Return Plate
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_PLANNED_OBSOLESCENCE: Add 1 Scrap to your hand. [gold]Loop D[/gold]. When upgraded, also gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_RECYCLING_WORK_ORDER: Decompose the leftmost Scrap in your hand. Gain 1 Energy. Draw 1 card. [gold]Loop D[/gold].
KILLER_FACTORY_CARD_KILLER_FACTORY_SCRAP: Clogs the workspace. A decomposer can process it.
